name: ruby-atomic
title: ruby-atomic
summary: atomic reference implementation for JRuby, Rubinius, and MRI
description:
atomic reference implementation for JRuby, Rubinius, and MRI
An atomic reference implementation for JRuby, Rubinius, and MRI.
.
This library provides an Atomic class that guarantees atomic updates to
its contained value.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use ruby-atomic because atomic reference implementation for JRuby, Rubinius, and MRI.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use ruby-atomic as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair ruby-atomic with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `ruby-atomic --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
